🤖 AI Interview Assistant

Backend API is now active and ready for frontend integration!

API Status: Online

Backend server is running successfully on port 5000

  • Health Check: GET /health
  • Interview Questions: GET /api/interview/questions
  • Submit Interview: POST /api/interview/submit

🧪 Test API Endpoints

Click the buttons below to test the API endpoints directly from the browser:

🚀 Next Steps

Your backend is fully functional! Here's what you can do next:

  • Build React Frontend: Run npm install && npm run build in /frontend
  • Connect Redux Store: The interview slice is ready for integration
  • Develop Components: Start building interview UI components
  • Test API Integration: Use the working endpoints above
